input.body:
func (v *TestVaultServer) clientUsingToken(t testing.TB, token string) *client {
	t.Helper()
	require := require.New(t)
	conf := &clientConfig{
		Addr:       v.Addr,
		Token:      TokenSecret(token),
		CaCert:     v.CaCert,

input.needle:

	assert.Error(err)

	ok := errors.As(err, &respErr)
	require.True(ok)
	assert.Equal(http.StatusForbidden, respErr.StatusCode)
